positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for horses_humans_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u9,axiom,
    horse != human).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define horse(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define has_hooves(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define human(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for horses_humans_neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for horses_humans_neg.tptp
1. ! [X0] : (horse(X0) => has_hooves(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (human(X0) => ~has_hooves(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. ~? [X0] : (human(X0) & horse(X0)) [input(conjecture)]
5. ~~? [X0] : (human(X0) & horse(X0)) [negated conjecture 4]
6. ? [X0] : (human(X0) & horse(X0)) [flattening 5]
7. ! [X0] : (has_hooves(X0) | ~horse(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
8. ! [X0] : (~has_hooves(X0) | ~human(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
9. ? [X0] : (human(X0) & horse(X0)) => (human(sK0) & horse(sK0)) [skolem symbol introduction]
10. human(sK0) & horse(sK0) [skolemisation 6,9]
11. ~horse(X0) | has_hooves(X0) [cnf transformation 7]
12. ~human(X0) | ~has_hooves(X0) [cnf transformation 8]
15. horse(sK0) [cnf transformation 10]
16. human(sK0) [cnf transformation 10]
17. has_hooves(sK0) [resolution 11,15]
18. ~has_hooves(sK0) [resolution 12,16]
19. $false [forward subsumption resolution 18,17]
% SZS output end Proof for horses_humans_neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
